# Skills

> The Agent Skills format was originally developed by Anthropic, released as
> an open standard, and has been adopted by a growing number of agent products.
> The standard is open to contributions from the broader ecosystem.

- https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/agent-skills-with-anthropic/

1. https://anthropic.skilljar.com/introduction-to-agent-skills
2. https://agentskills.io/home
